prompt: Expand the first image and make him sitting on king's throne, and add characters from the second image to surround him. Finally, add 'Walt Disney 1901 - 1966.' like the style of the third image.

Finally, add the text 'Walt Disney 1901 - 1966.' in the lower foreground, styled to match the reflective, 3D appearance of the 'Disney' logo from image 3.
objects: Multiple cartoon Mickey Mouse characters (surrounding Walt Disney and the throne)
